name: Khalid al-Niben

aspects.high_concept: The Oathbound Ansei, Who Hunts Wayn to 'Cleanse' the Name
aspects.trouble: Oath-Bound to the Contract (Pride Won't Let Him Quit)
other_aspects: Will Demand a Duel, Not an Ambush

stunts: Ansei Challenge: +2 to Fight when facing a single named opponent in a formal duel declared openly.
Breath of the Dunes: +2 to Will when resisting fear, intimidation, or supernatural pressure.
Mirror of Resolve: Once per scene, if Khalid is hit, he may immediately Create Advantage with Will at +2 to place 'Unbroken Focus' (1 free invoke) on himself.
notes: Legend tier. Not for Act I unless Wayn truly burns the world down. This should be a mythic duel with dialogue weight.
gm_notes: If he arrives, make it a 'chosen ground' scene. Offer ways to transform the conflict into character resolution.
